{"id":"phage_explorer-necy","content_hash":"8b9f308dd64d87db463b8a63433df9151fff9e6540bb5dadb4e51eed536fc411","title":"Implement amino acid touch HUD with details","description":"","notes":"# Implement Amino Acid Touch HUD with Details ## Problem Statement When users view the amino acid sequence, they see single-letter codes (M, D, L, A, K, etc.) without any context. Non-specialists don't know what these letters mean or what properties each amino acid has. On mobile/touch devices, tapping on an amino acid should display a rich information overlay (HUD = Heads-Up Display) for the duration of the touch. ## User Story > As a biology student viewing a phage protein sequence, > When I tap and hold on any amino acid letter, > I want to see detailed information about that amino acid, > So that I can understand its properties and role in the protein. ## HUD Content Requirements The HUD should display the following information for each amino acid: ### Basic Information - **Full Name**: e.g., "Methionine" (not just "Met" or "M") - **3-Letter Code**: e.g., "Met" - **1-Letter Code**: e.g., "M" ### Physical Properties - **Molecular Weight**: e.g., "149.21 g/mol" - **Molecular Formula**: e.g., "C₅H₁₁NO₂S" - **pI (Isoelectric Point)**: e.g., "5.74" ### Chemical Classification - **Type**: Hydrophobic / Polar / Acidic / Basic / Special - **Charge at pH 7**: Neutral / Positive / Negative - **Aromaticity**: Yes / No - **Contains Sulfur**: Yes / No ### Biological Context - **Essential**: Yes / No (for humans) - If essential: "Must be obtained from diet" - If non-essential: "Can be synthesized by the body" - **Energy to Synthesize**: ATP equivalents (e.g., "~31 ATP") ### Genetic Encoding - **Codon Count**: e.g., "1 codon" (unique) or "6 codons" (degenerate) - **Codons**: List of all codons encoding this AA - e.g., "AUG (also start codon)" - e.g., "UUU, UUC" for Phenylalanine ## Visual Design ``` ┌─────────────────────────────────────┐ │ ┌───┐ │ │ │ M │ METHIONINE │ │ └───┘ Met · Sulfur-containing │ ├─────────────────────────────────────┤ │ Molecular Weight 149.21 g/mol │ │ Formula C₅H₁₁NO₂S │ │ Classification Hydrophobic │ ├─────────────────────────────────────┤ │ Essential Amino Acid │ │ Must be obtained from diet │ │ Synthesis Cost: ~31 ATP │ ├─────────────────────────────────────┤ │ Encoded by: AUG │ │ (Also serves as START codon) │ │ Codon Uniqueness: 1/1 (unique) │ └─────────────────────────────────────┘ ``` ## Technical Implementation ### Data Structure ```typescript interface AminoAcidInfo { code1: string; // M code3: string; // Met name: string; // Methionine formula: string; // C5H11NO2S molecularWeight: number; pI: number; classification: 'hydrophobic' | 'polar' | 'acidic' | 'basic' | 'special'; chargeAtPh7: 'neutral' | 'positive' | 'negative'; isAromatic: boolean; containsSulfur: boolean; isEssential: boolean; synthesisAtp: number; codons: string[]; specialNotes?: string; // e.g., "Start codon" for Met } const AMINO_ACID_DATABASE: Record = { M: { code1: 'M', code3: 'Met', name: 'Methionine', formula: 'C₅H₁₁NO₂S', molecularWeight: 149.21, pI: 5.74, classification: 'hydrophobic', chargeAtPh7: 'neutral', isAromatic: false, containsSulfur: true, isEssential: true, synthesisAtp: 31, codons: ['AUG'], specialNotes: 'Also serves as the universal START codon', }, // ... all 20 amino acids }; ``` ### Touch Event Handling ```typescript function handleTouchStart(event: TouchEvent, position: number) { const aminoAcid = getAminoAcidAtPosition(position); if (!aminoAcid) return; // Show HUD at touch position showAminoAcidHUD(aminoAcid, { x: event.touches[0].clientX, y: event.touches[0].clientY, }); } function handleTouchEnd() { hideAminoAcidHUD(); } ``` ### Position Detection Need to map touch coordinates to sequence position: ```typescript function getAminoAcidAtPosition( touchX: number, touchY: number, gridLayout: GridLayout ): string | null { const cellIndex = gridLayout.getCellAtPoint(touchX, touchY); if (cellIndex === null) return null; // Account for reading frame const codonIndex = Math.floor(cellIndex / 3); const aaSequence = translateSequence(dnaSequence, readingFrame); return aaSequence[codonIndex] ?? null; } ``` ## HUD Component ```tsx function AminoAcidHUD({ aminoAcid, position, visible }: Props) { if (!visible || !aminoAcid) return null; const info = AMINO_ACID_DATABASE[aminoAcid]; return (
{info.code1}
{info.name}
{info.code3} · {info.classification}
{/* ... rest of HUD content */}
); } ``` ## Files to Create/Modify 1. **New:** `/packages/core/src/data/amino-acid-database.ts` - Complete database of all 20 amino acids 2. **New:** `/packages/web/src/components/AminoAcidHUD.tsx` - HUD component with styling 3. **Modify:** `/packages/web/src/components/SequenceView.tsx` - Add touch event handlers for HUD 4. **Modify:** `/packages/web/src/hooks/useSequenceGrid.ts` - Add position-to-amino-acid mapping ## Testing - [ ] Tap and hold shows HUD - [ ] Release dismisses HUD - [ ] All 20 amino acids have complete data - [ ] HUD positions correctly (above finger, not obscured) - [ ] Works on iOS Safari and Android Chrome - [ ] Smooth show/hide animation - [ ] Data is scientifically accurate ## Definition of Done - [ ] Touch HUD functional on mobile devices - [ ] All 20 amino acids have complete information - [ ] HUD is visually polished and readable - [ ] Scientific accuracy verified - [ ] No interference with normal scrolling","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-09T11:25:52.966266-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-09T11:48:13.199534-05:00","source_repo":".","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"phage_explorer-necy","depends_on_id":"phage_explorer-8mgm","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-09T11:26:24.161822-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]} {"id":"phage_explorer-nm9","content_hash":"61a6e37d0fd98d1c0e0b50b4bd794a8cd88f1d14f9ed5b69aa1ed23ea90c0dde","title":"Advanced: High-Resolution K-mer Anomaly Cartography","description":"Map localized k-mer rarity via z-scores vs reference corpus. Sliding window with Welford variance + LOF. Fuse with GC skew and coding density. Scrolling heat-strip under sequence grid; hotspots pulse; side panel shows top k-mers and genes. Flags HGT/AMG/defense islands. Novelty: Medium-high.","notes":"## HIGH-RESOLUTION K-MER ANOMALY CARTOGRAPHY **Full Implementation from Roadmap** ### Concept Map localized k-mer rarity/novelty (z-scores vs a reference corpus) to expose atypical islands (HGT, AMGs, anti-defense loci) and couple with GC/AT skew and coding density. ### How to Build **Background Model:** - Global corpus k-mer frequencies (k=3/5/7/9) precomputed - Store means/variances per k - Sources: all known phage genomes **Sliding Windows:** - Rust+WASM streaming k-mer counter - Welford's online variance algorithm - Per-window z-scores and LOF (Local Outlier Factor) - Cache per phage in SQLite **Composite Score:** ``` anomaly = w₁×z_kmer + w₂×GC_skew + w₃×(1-coding_density) ``` - Weights configurable by user - Higher score = more anomalous **Drill-Down:** - Link anomalous windows to nearby genes - Show top contributing k-mers - Motif and function predictions ### TUI Features - Scrolling heat-strip under sequence grid - Hotspots pulse/glow - Press 'enter' to open side panel with: - Top-k unusual k-mers - Nearby genes - Putative function - Anomaly threshold slider ### Why It's Good - Flags HGT, defense, AMG islands that annotation misses - Prioritizes 'what's weird here?' - Alignment-free detection - Compositional biology insights ### Implementation Stack - Rust+WASM sliding k-mer stats - TS/Ink heat-strip visualization - SQLite window cache - Optional LOF in Rust with kd-tree Novelty: 8/10, Pedagogical: 8/10, Wow Factor: 8/10","status":"in_progress","priority":3,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2025-12-07T00:17:45.217066-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-07T13:27:18.933998-05:00","source_repo":".","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"phage_explorer-nm9","depends_on_id":"phage_explorer-ojb","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-07T00:20:52.603582-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]} {"id":"phage_explorer-nmi","content_hash":"c9c1490c5fb3fc68c95150ffc4b48795e759335b7e0479df2a7fd9615aa88cc3","title":"[WEB-P1] Create offline.html fallback page","description":"","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-07T16:58:29.441559-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-07T17:53:55.445034-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-07T17:53:55.445034-05:00","source_repo":".","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"phage_explorer-nmi","depends_on_id":"phage_explorer-fdq","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-07T17:04:45.297385-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
